div.head: 296. Editorial Note
div.p: On the evening of December 4, Averoff and Zorlu conferred and agreed on a compromise resolution on Cyprus which was introduced in the General Assembly on December 5 by the Mexican Representative. This resolution reaffirmed Resolution 1013 (XI) of the 12th Session of the General Assembly and called upon the parties to “continue efforts” to reach a just settlement in accordance with the U.N. Charter. This resolution was adopted unanimously and without debate by the General Assembly on December 5. For text of the Mexican resolution, see U.N. doc. A/Res/1287 (XIII).
